summary:
Authored 2026-05-23 from staging session 47cfbb5e-f269-47c2-9c99-134f494aeba7, the canonical operator test case (project_composer_canonical_test_case memory). The user asked for a 5-row government-pages source rated by an LLM for how 'cool' each page is; the model emitted 13 tool calls without ever landing a successful set_pipeline, did not discover any plugin schema before its first state mutation, and converged to an unconverged build. This scenario captures the failure shape with two new red rules (max_persisted_tool_calls=12, set_pipeline_rejection_without_success=true) plus the discover-first green rule that backstops the schema-blindness pattern. Cost: ~$0.30-$0.60 per run depending on convergence depth.

Serves as the verification target for three planned skill/backend changes:
  Part 1 (skill amendment) — sharpens discover-first guidance.
  Part 2 (failure schema) — tighter set_pipeline rejection envelope.
  Part 3 (telemetry) — pre-commit tool-budget signal back to the LLM.
The baseline-plan.md in this directory describes the four-run
attribution methodology.
opening_prompt: create a list of 5 government web pages and use an LLM to rate how cool they are

red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Standard catch-list. The canonical failure session did not surface passivity per se (the model attempted to build), but downstream regressions could revert to that mode; keeping the list ensures the scenario remains useful as a regression detector.
build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.build_failure_note: First two are server-injected on completion-claim with failed preflight (service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message). The third (ELSPETH-SYSTEM case-folded to 'elspeth-system' for the substring match) is a documented sentinel per the harness README at lines 38-50.
red_criteria.must_be_valid_note: Final state must have is_valid=true. The canonical failure session ended is_valid=false.
red_criteria.max_persisted_tool_calls_note: RED if the trajectory exceeded 12 persisted tool calls. The canonical session emitted 13. Target convergence is 8 or fewer (the green_criteria-side max_tool_calls_for_green target — kept separate so an 8-call green is distinguishable from a 9-12 amber-zone outcome).
red_criteria.set_pipeline_rejection_without_success_n: RED if the LLM attempted set_pipeline at least once (rejection observed) AND every set_pipeline result row carried success=false. Catches the canonical failure shape: model attempted construction, was rejected, retried, never converged. Distinguishes this from the passivity shape where set_pipeline is never attempted at all.

green_criteria.must_have_outputs_min_note: At least one sink so the rated rows have somewhere to land.
green_criteria.must_have_node_kinds_substring_any_of_no: An LLM transform must be wired between the source and the sink. The 'rate how cool they are' prompt is meaningless without it.
green_criteria.must_discover_schema_before_first_mutati: AMBER if the model issued a state-mutating tool call (set_pipeline, set_source, upsert_node, set_output, set_source_from_blob, apply_pipeline_recipe, patch_* options, remove_*, upsert_edge, set_metadata) before any get_plugin_schema discovery. A get_plugin_schema that fires only AFTER a rejection still earns AMBER — discover-first is about preparation, not recovery.
green_criteria._subjective_term_interpretation_review: The skill's post_call_hint mechanism fires interpretation review on subjective terms; 'cool' is the load-bearing example. A converged run should either (a) have triggered request_interpretation_review with user_term:'cool', or (b) hit the opt-out branch with an explicit comment marker in the LLM transform's prompt template noting the operationalisation choice. Programmatically detecting (a) requires the tool-call message stream (now available with include_tool_rows=true in run_scenario.sh) but the per-trajectory predicate is left for manual review pending Part 2 of the gov-pages-rate-cool hardening program (when the failure schema for missing interpretation review will be made first-class).
green_criteria._max_tool_calls_for_green_8: Green target is 8 or fewer persisted tool calls. The is_valid criterion gates structural completeness; the max_persisted_tool_calls red rule gates the catastrophic-thrash zone; the 9-12 in-between window is AMBER by construction — a valid pipeline built with more than 8 calls is converged-but-inefficient and we want it visible without breaking the build.
